analysis_plan.research_question: Among NIH grants affected by 2025 federal funding actions, are research training and career development grants associated with higher odds of permanent termination compared to R&D grants?

exposure.coding: 1=Research Training and Career Development, 0=Research and Development

model.formula: terminated_binary ~ is_training_grant + C(org_type_grouped, Treatment('University-Medical')) + log_total_award + C(org_state_region, Treatment('Northeast'))

SA1.name: Subgroup by institution type
SA1.description: Run logistic regression separately within each org_type_grouped stratum

SA2.name: Model without region adjustment
SA2.description: is_training_grant + C(org_type_grouped) + log_total_award only (no region covariate)

SA3.name: State fixed effects (top 15 states)
SA3.description: Replace region with dummy coding for top 15 states by N; remainder as 'Other'

reporting.primary_estimate: OR with 95% CI and two-sided p-value for is_training_grant
